projectDescription: Python-based Infrastructure as Code (IaC) solution for automating, securing, and segmenting branch office networks using Cisco devices and GNS3 simulation
keyFeatures: GUI-based mass configuration of Cisco IOSvL2 switches for multiple branch offices
Automatic Layer 2/Layer 3 detection and adaptive configuration
VLAN segmentation with DHCP pools and security ACLs
QoS MQC (Modular Quality of Service) with class-map and policy-map
Device security hardening (enable secret, login block-for, banner MOTD)
GRE over IPsec tunnel configuration (IKEv1 + ESP-AES-256)
Automated backup to AWS S3 with SSE-AES256 encryption
OSPF dynamic routing and static route management
Safety protections for uplink interfaces and SSH access
publicApiSurface: build_commands() - Generate IOS commands from configuration
build_cleanup_commands() - Safe cleanup of previous configurations
run_on_switch() - Connect and apply configuration to a switch
test_connection() - Test SSH connectivity and detect Layer 2/3
detect_l3() - Detect if switch has IP routing active
build_gre_ipsec_commands() - Generate GRE over IPsec tunnel commands
